title: Make Code Testable
description: Restructure hard-to-test code to enable unit testing.
content:
This code is hard to test:

```
{{code}}
```

Refactor it to be testable: introduce seams for dependencies (I/O, time, randomness, network), separate decision logic from side effects, and make outputs observable. Don't change behavior. Then show one example test that the new structure makes possible but the old one didn't.
